footer.tagline: Live volleyball statistics. Log every action, follow the score in real time and improve match after match.
footer.rights: © {year} Voley Stats Live. All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: Log the match from your iPad while you coach — even with no connection —, share the score and stats live and break down every set when it's over. Say goodbye to paper scoresheets.

product.title: Take control of the whole match
product.text: Log every action with the quick grid — designed so one person can coach and record at the same time — or straight on the court map, with attack and serve trajectories. You choose the detail: every touch or just the actions that end the rally. And you make your substitutions with data, not gut feeling.
product.point1: Score, rotation and server update on their own.
product.point2: Automatic detection of scoring and error runs.
product.point3: Breakdown per player and per court area.
product.point4: Filter the stats set by set.

how.title: From the court to the report in three steps
how.subtitle: No learning curve. Start logging in your very first match.
how.step1Text: Record every play from your iPad with the quick grid or on the court map, with substitutions, timeouts and graded reception. Works offline, in any gym.
how.step2Text: Share the match code and anyone can watch the score and stats in real time from the web.
how.step3Text: When it's over, you get the full match report: side-out and break, rotations, attack maps and much more. With premium, export it as a PDF to review with the team.

features.title: Everything your coaching staff needs
features.subtitle: Tools built for coaches, analysts and players.
features.f1Text: Follow the result set by set and how the match unfolds in real time from any device.
features.f2Text: Evaluate individual performance in every area and find your roster's strengths.
features.f3Text: Side-out and break, attack by phase (K1/K2) and by pass quality, reception graded on 4 levels and setter-attacker connections.
features.f4Text: Visualize point and error runs to understand the key moments of every set.
features.f5Text: With premium, export match and season reports as PDFs to share with your coaching staff and players.
features.f6Text: Share a simple code and the whole team can check the stats online, no complicated sign-ups.

download.title: Take your team to the next level
download.text: Download Voley Stats for iPad and log your next match for free, live stats included. Go premium whenever you want the season history, PDF reports and cloud backup.

faq.title: Questions?
faq.subtitle: And if you can't find your answer, write to us at voleystats{'@'}gmail.com and we'll help.
faq.a1: It's the live web companion of Voley Stats, the iPad app for capturing and analyzing volleyball statistics. You record every action of the match from the app, and anyone can follow the score and stats live on this web, free and with no sign-up.
faq.q2: How do I check my team's stats online?
faq.a2: Go to the 'Watch live' section, enter your team code and access the live score and match stats, with a breakdown per set and per player.
faq.a3: Everything that happens on the court: every touch or just the rally-ending actions, attack and serve trajectories on the court map, reception graded on 4 levels, serve quality, K1/K2 phase tracking, substitutions and timeouts. The score, rotation and server update on their own.
faq.q4: Can I download a match report?
faq.a4: Yes. When the match ends the app builds a full report: side-out and break, where the points came from, rotations, attack by phase and by pass quality, setter-attacker connections, unforced errors and attack maps. With the premium plan you can export it as a PDF to share with the team.
faq.q5: Do I need an internet connection?
faq.a5: Not for logging: the app works fully offline, with a local database, so you can capture and check stats in any gym. You only need internet to share the live feed on this web, use the OBS overlay, the public team page or the cloud backup.
faq.a6: Downloading the app and logging your matches is free, live match stats included. The premium plan adds the team history and season stats with filters, PDF export, cloud backup and the ability to fill in stats you missed live. Watching the live feeds on the web is always free.

teamCode.title: Live stats
teamCode.subtitle: Enter the match code or paste the team link to access the live score and statistics. Both are shared by whoever logs the match from the app.

paragraphs: This Privacy Policy describes Our policies and procedures on the collection, use and disclosure of Your information when You use the Service and tells You about Your privacy rights and how the law protects You.

sections.heading: Interpretation and Definitions
paragraphs: Interpretation: capitalized terms have meanings defined below, applying whether singular or plural.
Definitions:
list: Account: a unique account created for You to access our Service.
Affiliate: an entity that controls, is controlled by or is under common control with a party, where "control" means ownership of 50% or more of the shares.
Application: Voley stats, the software program provided by the Company.
Company: referred to as "the Company", "We", "Us" or "Our", refers to Voley stats.
Country: Spain.
Device: any device that can access the Service such as a computer, a cellphone or a digital tablet.
Personal Data: any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
Service: the Application.
Service Provider: any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Company.
Usage Data: data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself.
You: the individual accessing or using the Service, or the company or other legal entity on behalf of which such individual is accessing or using the Service.

sections.heading: Collecting and Using Your Personal Data
paragraphs: Types of Data Collected:

Personal Data — while using Our Service, We may ask You to provide Us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify You, including: Email address and Usage Data.

Usage Data — collected automatically, may include Your Device's Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that You visit, the time and date of Your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When accessing via mobile device: device type, unique ID, IP address, operating system, mobile Internet browser type, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

sections.heading: Use of Your Personal Data
paragraphs: The Company may use Personal Data to:
list: Provide and maintain our Service.
Manage Your Account.
Perform a contract (purchase of products/services).
Contact You (email or equivalent electronic communication regarding updates or informative communications).
Provide You with news, special offers and general information about similar goods and services unless You have opted not to receive them.
Manage Your requests.
Evaluate or conduct business transfers.
Other purposes such as data analysis, usage trends, and improving our Service.

sections.heading: Sharing
paragraphs: We may share Your personal information:
list: With Service Providers (to monitor and analyze use).
In business transfers.
With Affiliates (who must honor this policy).
With business partners.
With other users (when You interact in public areas).
With Your consent.

sections.heading: Retention
paragraphs: Only for as long as necessary for the purposes set out in this policy; Usage Data generally for shorter periods except for security or legal obligations.

sections.heading: Transfer
paragraphs: Information is processed at the Company's operating offices and other places where the parties involved are located, and may be transferred to computers outside Your jurisdiction; the Company will take reasonable steps to ensure data is treated securely.

sections.heading: Delete Your Personal Data
paragraphs: You have the right to delete or request assistance in deleting the Personal Data We have collected; You may update, amend or delete Your information from Your Account settings or by contacting Us. Note we may retain certain information when legally required.

sections.heading: Disclosure
list: Business Transactions (with notice before Personal Data becomes subject to a different policy).
Law enforcement (if required by law or valid public authority requests).

Other legal requirements (comply with a legal obligation; protect the Company's rights or property; prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing; protect the personal safety of users or the public; protect against legal liability).

sections.heading: Security
paragraphs: No method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure; We use commercially acceptable means but cannot guarantee absolute security.

sections.heading: Children's Privacy
paragraphs: Our Service does not address anyone under 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under 13. If You are a parent or guardian and aware Your child provided Personal Data, contact Us. If We rely on consent and Your country requires parental consent, We may require parental consent before processing.

sections.heading: Links to Other Websites
paragraphs: Our Service may contain links to third-party sites not operated by Us; review their policies; We assume no responsibility for third-party content or practices.

sections.heading: Changes
paragraphs: We may update this policy; We will notify via email and/or a prominent notice on the Service and update the "Last updated" date; review periodically.

sections.heading: Contact Us
paragraphs: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us by email at voleystats{'@'}gmail.com.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.note: This document is an informative template and does not constitute legal advice.

sections.heading: 1. Who we are and scope
paragraphs: Voley Stats is an iPad app, available on the App Store, for capturing and analyzing volleyball statistics. This website (voleystats.vercel.app) lets you follow matches live and view reports and statistics shared from the app. These terms govern the use of both.

sections.heading: 2. Acceptance
paragraphs: By using the app or the website you accept these terms of use and our privacy policy. If you do not agree with them, do not use the service.

sections.heading: 3. The app
paragraphs: We grant you a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the app. Downloads and purchases — including premium features such as the filtered history, PDF export, cloud backup and completing stats afterwards — are handled through Apple's App Store and governed by its terms. Apple's standard EULA applies to the app.

sections.heading: 4. The website
paragraphs: Access to the website is free and requires no registration. Match and team links are public: anyone with the link can view their content.

sections.heading: 5. Content and coach responsibility
paragraphs: Captured statistics belong to whoever captures them. By enabling live sharing or sharing a link, the user authorizes their publication on the website and declares having the necessary consents from the people whose data appears (players' names and jersey numbers, including minors, under the responsibility of the club or coach). You can disable live sharing from the app at any time.

sections.heading: 6. Acceptable use
paragraphs: It is forbidden to use the service for unlawful purposes, to perform massive automated access (scraping), to interfere with the operation of the service or to attempt to access other teams' data without having their link.

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual property
paragraphs: The software, brand, design and generated reports belong to Voley Stats or its licensors. The statistics belong to the user who captures them.

sections.heading: 8. Availability and warranties
paragraphs: The service is provided "as is". Statistics are for informational and sporting purposes: we do not guarantee their accuracy or the continuous availability of the service, and we are not responsible for decisions made based on them.

sections.heading: 9. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law, we shall not be liable for indirect damages arising from the use of the service. Nothing in these terms limits the rights granted to you by consumer law.

sections.heading: 10. Changes
paragraphs: We may update these terms by publishing the new version on this page with its update date.

sections.heading: 11. Governing law and jurisdiction
paragraphs: These terms are governed by Spanish law. When you act as a consumer, the courts of your place of residence shall have jurisdiction.

sections.heading: 12. Contact
paragraphs: For any questions about these terms you can write to us at voleystats{'@'}gmail.com.

contact.title: Let's talk
contact.text: Questions, suggestions or problems with the app or the website? Write to us and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Voley Stats contact
contact.emailIntro: Or write to us directly at:

support.title: App support
support.text: Something not working or can't find a feature? Tell us what happens and which device you use the app on.

feedback.title: Feedback
feedback.text: Ideas, suggestions and requests for new stats: we love hearing them and they help us prioritize.
